title: ruppia maritima subsp. obliqua
intro: Ruppia maritima subsp. obliqua, also known as the Mediterranean water-witch or Mediterranean ditch-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ruppiaceae. This aquatic plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ruppia maritima subsp. obliqua include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
